items.name: シャトーカミヤ旧醸造場施設（3棟）

en.name_romaji: Shatō Kamiya kyū jōzōjō shisetsu (san tō)
en.name_en: Former Brewing Facilities of Château Kamiya (Three Buildings)
en.description_en: These are the former brewing facilities of Château Kamiya, comprising three buildings, structures classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2008-06-09. It is located in Chūō 3-chōme, Ushiku City.

en.name_en: Seated Statue of Amida Nyorai
en.description_en: This seated statue of Amida Nyorai is a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1958-03-12. It is located in Okuhara-machi, Ushiku City.

en.name_en: Tachi Sword, Signed "Made by Nagamitsu of Osafune in Bizen Province"
en.description_en: This tachi is a long sword bearing the signature "made by Nagamitsu of Osafune in Bizen Province," a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1961-03-24.

items.name: 太刀　銘　大和國当麻友（以下切）伝友清

en.name_romaji: Tachi, mei Yamato no Kuni Taema Tomo (irei kire) den Tomokiyo
en.name_en: Tachi Sword, Signed "Yamato Province Taema Tomo..." (remainder cut), Attributed to Tomokiyo
en.description_en: This tachi is a long sword bearing the partial signature "Yamato Province Taema Tomo..." with the remainder cut off, attributed to Tomokiyo, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1961-03-24.

en.name_en: Seated Statue of the Eleven-headed Kannon
en.description_en: This seated statue of the eleven-headed Kannon (Jūichimen Kannon Bosatsu) is a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1985-12-16. It is located in Kuno-machi, Ushiku City.

en.name_en: Main Hall and Niō Gate of Kannonji Temple
en.description_en: The Main Hall and Niō Gate of Kannonji Temple are structures classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1991-01-25. It is located in Kuno-machi, Ushiku City.

en.name_en: Five-ring Stupa at the Tōrinji Castle Ruins
en.description_en: This gorintō is a five-ring stone stupa located at the Tōrinji castle ruins, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1974-05-01. It is located in Shinchi-machi, Ushiku City.

en.name_en: Five-ring Stupa of Tokugetsuin
en.description_en: This gorintō is a five-ring stone stupa at Tokugetsuin, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1983-05-06. It is located in Jōchū-machi, Ushiku City.

en.description_en: This kaya is a Japanese nutmeg tree, a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1983-05-06. It is located in Jōchū-machi, Ushiku City.

en.description_en: This is a Dainichi mound with a stone statue of Dainichi Nyorai, a historic site (shiseki) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1983-05-06. It is located in Shimada-machi, Ushiku City.

en.description_en: The Nakane ichirizuka is a milestone mound marking a historic road, a historic site (shiseki) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1987-04-01. It is located in Hitachino-nishi 3-chōme, Ushiku City.

en.description_en: This hōtō is a treasure pagoda at Yakushiji Temple, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1987-04-01. It is located in Tamiya-machi, Ushiku City.

en.description_en: This seated wooden statue of Yakushi Nyorai is a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1999-06-23. It is located in Jōchū-machi, Ushiku City.

en.description_en: The Narui ichirizuka is a milestone mound marking a historic road, a historic site (shiseki) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2001-06-22. It is located in Jōchū-machi, Ushiku City.

en.description_en: The Kosaka Castle Ruins are a historic site (shiseki) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2006-11-24. It is located in Kosaka-machi, Ushiku City.

en.description_en: This is the tomb monument (bohi) of the haiku poet Sekiryū, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2008-09-26. It is located in Ushiku-machi, Ushiku City.

en.description_en: This is a stone statue of Dainichi Nyorai of the Diamond Realm, also known as the Ji-nenbutsu pagoda, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2008-09-26. It is located in Tamiya-machi, Ushiku City.

en.name_en: Amida Nyorai Triad
en.description_en: This is a triad of Amida Nyorai and attendants, a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2008-09-26. It is located in Inooka-machi, Ushiku City.

en.description_en: This is a jewel-shaped inkstone (hōju suzuri) excavated at the Ubagami site, an archaeological material classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2010-06-28.

en.name_en: Ungyotei
en.description_en: Ungyotei is a historic building, a structure classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2010-06-28. It is located in Jōchū-machi, Ushiku City.

en.name_en: Statue of Shōmen Kongō
en.description_en: This is a statue of Shōmen Kongō, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2010-06-28. It is located in Higashimamiana-machi, Ushiku City.

items.name: 阿弥陀来迎及び千手観音図

en.description_en: This is a painting depicting the descent (raigō) of Amida and the thousand-armed Kannon, a painting classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2011-10-17. It is located in Kuno-machi, Ushiku City.

en.description_en: This is the avenue of trees lining the approach path to Tamiyasan Yakushiji Temple, a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2011-10-17. It is located in Tamiya-machi, Ushiku City.

en.name_en: "Old Willow and Desolate Village," Light-colored Painting on Paper by Ogawa Usen
en.description_en: This is a light-colored painting on paper titled "Old Willow and Desolate Village" by Ogawa Usen, a painting classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2012-05-21.

en.name_romaji: Shihon tansai Denka shiki sōga, Ogawa Usen hitsu
en.name_en: "Grasses of the Four Seasons at a Farmhouse," Light-colored Painting on Paper by Ogawa Usen
en.description_en: This is a light-colored painting on paper depicting grasses of the four seasons at a farmhouse by Ogawa Usen, a painting classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2012-05-21.

en.description_en: This is a stone monument dedicated to the kappa, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2013-04-22. It is located in Jōchū-machi, Ushiku City.

en.description_en: This is a handscroll depicting the daimyō procession of the Ushiku domain, a historical material classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2018-03-26.

en.name_en: Illustration of Military Battle Formations
en.description_en: This is an illustration of military battle formations, a historical material classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2025-12-18.

en.name_en: Portrait of Yamaguchi Shigemasa
en.description_en: This is a portrait of Yamaguchi Shigemasa, a painting classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2025-12-18.
